'''Toma''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who was the leader of the resistance movement on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Acherin]]. He was a tall man with a shaven head.

==Biography==
During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Toma allied himself with the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatists]], but worked with [[Senior Jedi General]] [[Garen Muln]] to negotiate a treaty. However, when [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] was executed, the plans for a treaty were eliminated. Toma and the newly formed Acherin resistance helped the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] safely escape the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] to head for safety on [[Ilum/Legends|Ilum]].<ref name="LOTJDW" />

Toma led the resistance through battle against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] for nearly a [[Standard year/Legends|year]], operating out of the ancient [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Eluthan]]. In the final days of the resistance, Toma met [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], [[Ferus Olin]], and [[Trever Flume]]. Ferus aided the resistance's [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] squadrons, but the Imperials were too powerful, and Toma ordered them to retreat. He contacted the Imperial [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]], [[Riwwel]], and announced their surrender. The Admiral felt however that the best punishment would be the resistance's elimination, by way of the [[Bomb/Legends|bombing]] of Eluthan. Kenobi, Olin, and Flume helped Toma and his assistant, [[Raina Quill]], escape the planet.<ref name="LOTJDW" />

After escaping Acherin, the group found an [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] in an [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmospheric]] storm, and used it and its [[space shear]]s to hide from Imperial forces. Toma and Raina stayed on the asteroid for a few days with food and supplies while the others went to find Garen Muln on Ilum. When the group returned with Muln, as well as prefab shelters and more supplies that were donated by [[Roan Lands]], Toma and Raina helped Ferus and Trever form a [[Jedi asteroid|sanctuary]] for survivors of the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]] on the asteroid.<ref name="LOTJDW" />

It was later found that Toma was actually a [[Spy/Legends|mole]] placed right at the beginning of the journey so that he could transmit the coordinates of the secret base. When Raina found Toma transmitting the coordinates, he fired his [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]], killing her, but not before she could do the same.<ref name="LOTJR" />
